name: superpowers-ext
description: standalone engineering plugin complementary to superpowers

interface.shortDescription: Engineering skills for frontend, backend, database, security, and browser QA.
interface.longDescription: Superpowers Ext is a Codex-ready skills plugin focused on concrete software engineering execution: frontend and backend patterns, Postgres and migrations, browser QA, deployment, documentation lookup, security review, and design quality guidance.
defaultPrompt: Review this code for security issues.
Help me verify this deploy in a browser.
Show me the right Postgres pattern for this schema change.
